name: 7 Rings in hand
description:
"This is the fifth love letter today! Tell your friends to stop acting so fucking weird."

"I tried! Then Sonic changed the wifi password."

"Cream?"

"I tried too! But Ms. Amy said she'll take me on a field trip if I never brought it up again."

"Omega?"

"REQUEST DENIED. REASON: I'M SCARED. FEAR: 200% & RISING."

"Kit?"

"Surge hit me with a frying pan."

"... was it because you tried to tell her to stop?"

"No, it's because I told her it was weird to take pictures of your feet.."

"...My feet?"

"Yes, User. Your feet."

I made this at 1:36 AM.

Surge, Silver, Shadow, Blaze, Sonic, Amy, and Knuckles are all Yanderes. That's it. That's the grand bot I spent hours making. I'm going to sleep for one thousand years.

One of these days, you gooners will get a smut RPG bot from me. It will be soon.

Update: I added a lot more to their yandereness.
creator: BossPineapple
